# Mobile Fauna  

\newpage

## Brachiopods  
```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE, fig.dim=c(10,10)}
load_and_plot(7)
```

## Crustaceans
```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE, fig.dim=c(10,10)}
for(i in 42:46){
  load_and_plot(i)
}
```

## Echinoderms
```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE, fig.dim=c(10,10)}
for(i in 47:64){
  load_and_plot(i)
}
```

## Fish
```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE, fig.dim=c(10,10)}
for(i in 65:67){
  load_and_plot(i)
}
```

## Jellies
```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE, fig.dim=c(10,10)}
for(i in 73:76){
  load_and_plot(i)
}
```

## Molluscs
```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE, fig.dim=c(10,10)}
for(i in 83:88){
  load_and_plot(i)
}
```

## Seaspiders
```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE, fig.dim=c(10,10)}
load_and_plot(89)
```

## Worms
```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE, fig.dim=c(10,10)}
for(i in 109:116){
  load_and_plot(i)
}
```
